intro: At mDigiMart, we are committed to protecting your privacy and handling your personal data with transparency and care. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and your rights as a user of our platform. By accessing or using mDigiMart, you agree to the practices described in this policy.

content.text: We collect information you provide directly and data generated through your use of our platform.

content.subtitle: A. Personal Information
items: Full name
Email address
Phone number
Billing and shipping address
Payment details (processed exclusively via secure, PCI-DSS compliant third-party gateways)
Account credentials (username and encrypted password)
Any additional information you voluntarily share with us

content.subtitle: B. Non-Personal Information
items: IP address and approximate geographic location
Browser type and version
Device type, operating system, and hardware identifiers
Referring website URLs
Clickstream data: pages visited, time spent, and interactions on our platform

content.text: We use collected data solely for legitimate business purposes and to deliver a better experience to you.

items: To process, fulfill, and manage your orders
To communicate with you regarding order status, updates, and customer support
To personalize your shopping experience with relevant recommendations
To improve our website, product catalog, and overall services
To comply with applicable legal and regulatory obligations
To detect, prevent, and investigate fraud or unauthorized activity

content.text: We do not sell or rent your personal data to third parties. We may share your information only in the following limited circumstances:

items: Service providers: Delivery partners, payment processors, and marketing agencies acting on our behalf under binding data protection agreements
Legal compliance: Government or regulatory authorities when required by applicable law or in response to a valid legal process
Platform tools: Third-party analytics or advertising tools integrated into our site, governed by strict data sharing agreements

content.text: We implement industry-standard security measures to safeguard your personal data, including:

items: SSL/TLS encryption for all data in transit
Secure, access-controlled servers with regular backups
Role-based access controls limiting data exposure to authorized personnel
Periodic security audits and vulnerability assessments

content.text: While we strive to protect your information, no internet-based system is entirely immune to risk. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and notifying us immediately of any suspected unauthorized access.
As a user of mDigiMart, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:

items: Access & correction: View and update your personal information at any time through your account settings
Data deletion: Request the deletion of your account or personal data, subject to applicable legal retention requirements
Marketing opt-out: Unsubscribe from promotional communications at any time via the unsubscribe link in our emails or by contacting us directly

content.text: To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at info@mdigimart.com.
We use cookies and similar tracking technologies (e.g., pixels, web beacons) to:

items: Enhance site functionality and remember your preferences
Analyze traffic patterns and measure the effectiveness of our campaigns
Deliver personalized product recommendations

content.text: You can manage or disable cookies through your browser settings at any time. Note that disabling cookies may affect certain site features.

Our website may contain links to external websites operated by third parties. We are not responsible for the privacy practices or content of these sites. We encourage you to review their privacy policies before providing any personal information.

mDigiMart is not directed at individuals under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personal information from minors. If we become aware that we have inadvertently collected data from a child under 18, we will promptly delete such information.

We may update this Privacy Policy periodically to reflect changes in our practices, technology, or legal requirements. Any significant updates will be communicated by posting the revised policy on our website with an updated effective date. We encourage you to review this policy regularly.
If you have any questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please reach out to us:

details.address: Door No: 12-8-42, 2nd Floor, Savithri Mallaiah Arcade, Lallaguda, Secunderabad, Hyderabad, Telangana – 500017
